english: A gourd hangs from a green string. The gourd is painted with a black flower design on a light background. The flower has several petals that radiate from the center. Other gourds hang in the background, also decorated with black painted designs. The gourds are small and round in shape.
target: Mẽ̀ ar. Mẽ̀. Kàl wö̀ shkì. Shkíshkî butûtû. Kàl wö̀ tso'. Mẽ̀ ar. Mẽ̀ tsîr. Mẽ̀ krôrô.
gold: Mè̱wö bitsì̱, i ki̱ka íyi diö́köl yö’tso wè̱s dù diö́köl ês.

english: A baby lies in a hammock. The hammock has white fabric with yellow, blue, and orange stripes. The baby wears dark clothing that covers the head and face partially. The hammock hangs above ground. A stone wall appears in the background. The ground below shows earth and some grass.
target: Alà tsîr tër. Alà tsîr tso' kapö̀ a̱. Kapö̀ wa̱ butûtû tso'. Alà tsîr tö apàio shkì apàio tã'. Kapö̀ ar. Akõ' ák wa tso' shkíshkî a̱. Ĩ́s tso'. Íyök tso'. Ká̱ ĩ́s tso'.
gold: Alà âr sku’ a̱. ês ie’pa rö alà tsè̱ke. Sku’ wö̀a krôrô.

english: A black plate sits on a floral tablecloth. The plate contains several foods. In the center is a mound of rice mixed with beans and small pieces of vegetables. To the left are several pieces of fried plantain that appear golden brown. To the right is a portion of food that looks soft and pale, possibly cassava or another starchy vegetable. A fork rests on the right side of the plate near the edge. The tablecloth underneath has a pattern with flowers and appears to be light blue with white and other colors.
target: Shkì tso'. Chkà tso'. Àrros tso'. Bö' tso'. Chkà tso'. Tso'. Kàl wö̀ tso'.
gold: Chkö̀ a̱ àrros tso', átu cha̱mù̱tak e̱na̱ krò tak. Chkö̀ ña̱' bua'ë.

english: A man wears a shirt blue. The man holds a bunch bananas green. The bananas hang. The man sits on a bench wooden. The bench is in a house. The house has a roof. The roof has vegetation. The roof has poles wooden. A wall is behind the man. The wall has vegetation dry. Bunches bananas hang in the background. The bunches are yellow. The bunches are green. Objects sit on a platform. A gourd white sits on the platform. A gourd has a lid. Another gourd sits on the platform.
target: Wë́m tö apàio dalôlô apàio tã'. Wë́m tö bö' dalôlô tsók. Bö' ar. Wë́m tchër. Kula' kàl wa tso' ù a̱. Ù wa̱ ù wö́kir tso'. Ù wö́kir wa̱ kãñĩ́k tso'. Ù wö́kir wa̱ kàl kàl wa tso'. Akõ' tso' wë́m a̱. Akõ' wa̱ kãñĩ́k síũ tso'. Bö' ar. Bö' sarûrû. Bö' dalôlô. Íyi tchër. Mẽ̀ butûtû tchër. Mẽ̀ wa̱ tso'. Mẽ̀ tchër.
gold: Akë́kë tso' cha̱mú̱li ajkáchök. Ie' wa̱ cha̱mù̱ tso' ie' ù a̱. Ie' apàio si̱ê̱

english: A man walks through a river. The water reaches his knees. He wears a hat and carries a bag on his back. A dog swims in the water near the man. Trees and vegetation grow thick along both riverbanks. The sky appears light above the forest.
target: Wë́m shkö̀k. Di' tso'. Ie' wa̱ tso'. Ie' tsók. Chìchi klö̀u̱k. Kàl wérök. Kãñĩ́k wérök. Kṍ butûtû.
gold: Wë́m tso’ shkö́tchö di’ a̱. Ie’ wa̱ dalì dàmi̱. Ie’ wak dör êköl.

english: A painted gourd with a black flower design hangs from a green cord.
gold: Mè̱wö bitsì̱, i ki̱ka íyi diö́köl yö’tso wè̱s dù diö́köl ês.

english: A baby rests in a hanging hammock with colorful striped patterns.
target: Alà tsîr ẽ̀nũk. Kapö̀ tsikirîrî tso'.
gold: Alà âr sku’ a̱. ês ie’pa rö alà tsè̱ke. Sku’ wö̀a krôrô.

english: A plate of rice with beans sits alongside fried plantains and tamales on a floral tablecloth.
target: Àrros tso'. Bùl tso'. Bö' tso'. Ñã' tso'.
gold: Chkö̀ a̱ àrros tso', átu cha̱mù̱tak e̱na̱ krò tak. Chkö̀ ña̱' bua'ë.

english: A man holds a bunch of green bananas inside a traditional house with a thatched roof.
target: Wë́m tö bö' dalôlô tsók. Wë́m tso' ù a̱.
gold: Akë́kë tso' cha̱mú̱li ajkáchök. Ie' wa̱ cha̱mù̱ tso' ie' ù a̱. Ie' apàio si̱ê̱

english: A man wades across a river with dense forest on the opposite bank.
gold: Wë́m tso’ shkö́tchö di’ a̱. Ie’ wa̱ dalì dàmi̱. Ie’ wak dör êköl.
